/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Reserved by the Scheduler module's 'scheduler_scheduled_media' overview view, which declares path admin/content/media/scheduled. It is currently disabled only because scheduling isn't enabled on a media type yet; scheduler and media modules are both installed, so enabling scheduling on any media bundle imports/enables this view (via SchedulerManager::viewsUpdate) and reclaims the path. Also an admin namespace. Not safe.

/admin/structure/taxonomy/scheduled.reason: Reserved by the Scheduler module's 'scheduler_scheduled_taxonomy_term' overview view, which declares path admin/structure/taxonomy/scheduled. Disabled now only because scheduling isn't enabled on a taxonomy vocabulary; scheduler and taxonomy modules are installed, so enabling scheduling routinely imports/enables this view and reclaims the path. Also an admin namespace. Not safe.

/research-library.reason: Claimed by a DISABLED view: views.view.files display page_1 declares path 'research-library'. No enabled route responds now, but if that view is ever enabled (a routine config change) it collides with a node placed here. Risky/unsafe.

/search.reason: Actively owned by the enabled 'search' view page display (route view.search.page, path /search). A node with this alias would shadow/hijack the search page. Not safe.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed. Live router returns no route, no path alias exists, and the path-owner tool reports no owner and no negative/latent contracts. Safe to use as a node URL alias.

/zzz-unclaimed-1ba269.reason: Unclaimed. Live router returns no route, no path alias exists, no owner and no latent claims. Safe to use as a node URL alias.
